  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractSymmetry
    Represents the traditional symmetric pattern of the Sudoku puzzle to be generated.
    App
    Entry point for the Sudoku command-line interface.
    <<<<<<< HEAD
    Controller
    Concrete implementation of IController, facilitating communication between the Model and View layers of the stack.
    ControllerException
    Base type for checked exceptions thrown by sudoku.cli.IController operations, representing recoverable error conditions that arise from invalid user actions.
    DihedralSymmetry
    The puzzle is to be symmetric both rotationally and reflectionally.
    EmptyCellException
    Thrown when an operation attempts to clear a cell that is already empty.
    EmptyGridException
    Thrown when an operation requires a non-empty grid, but the Sudoku grid is already empty.
    GivenCellException
    Thrown when an operation attempts to modify a cell that stores a given/hinted value.
    GridSolvedException
    Thrown when an operation requires unsolved cells, but the Sudoku grid has already been solved.
    IController
    Outlines the controller layer of the game, which wraps the sudoku package, facilitating all communication between the model and view layers of the MVC stack of the game.
    InvalidCellException
    Thrown when a requested cell coordinate does not exist within the bounds of the Sudoku grid.
    InvalidValueException
    Thrown when a requested value to place in a cell exceeds the size of the Sudoku grid.
    ISudokuGenerator
    Generates 9x9 Sudoku puzzles at a given difficulty and cell-removal symmetry.
    ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    Represents the difficulty level of the generated Sudoku puzzle.
    ISudokuGrid
    Represents a Sudoku grid, providing higher-level operations on top of the basic ISudokuState cell access.
    ISudokuSolver
    Provides operations for solving a Sudoku grid and for validating cell placements and grid states.
    NoSymmetry
    There is to be no enforced symmetry in the puzzle.
    ReflectionalSymmetry
    The givens are mirrored vertically, creating identical left-to-right halves.
    RotationalSymmetry
    Two-fold (180 degree) rotation: the grid looks the same if you turn it completely upside down.
    SudokuGenerator
    Generates 9x9 Sudoku puzzles by producing a full valid grid and then removing cells according to a target ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty and AbstractSymmetry pattern.
    SudokuGrid
    Public-facing representation of a Sudoku grid.
    SudokuSolver
    Solves a Sudoku grid using recursive backtracking.
    Tuple2<T,U>
    =======
    ControllerException
    Base type for checked exceptions thrown by sudoku.cli.IController operations, representing recoverable error conditions that arise from invalid user actions.
    DihedralSymmetry
    The puzzle is to be symmetric both rotationally and reflectionally.
    EmptyCellException
    Thrown when an operation attempts to clear a cell that is already empty.
    EmptyGridException
    Thrown when an operation requires a non-empty grid, but the Sudoku grid is already empty.
    GivenCellException
    Thrown when an operation attempts to modify a cell that stores a given/hinted value.
    GridSolvedException
    Thrown when an operation requires unsolved cells, but the Sudoku grid has already been solved.
    IController
    Outlines the controller layer of the game, which wraps the sudoku package, facilitating all communication between the model and view layers of the MVC stack of the game.
    InvalidCellException
    Thrown when a requested cell coordinate does not exist within the bounds of the Sudoku grid.
    InvalidValueException
    Thrown when a requested value to place in a cell exceeds the size of the Sudoku grid.
    ISudokuGenerator
    Generates 9x9 Sudoku puzzles at a given difficulty and cell-removal symmetry.
    ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    Represents the difficulty level of the generated Sudoku puzzle.
    ISudokuGrid
    Represents a Sudoku grid, providing higher-level operations on top of the basic ISudokuState cell access.
    ISudokuSolver
    Provides operations for solving a Sudoku grid and for validating cell placements and grid states.
    NoSymmetry
    There is to be no enforced symmetry in the puzzle.
    ReflectionalSymmetry
    The givens are mirrored vertically, creating identical left-to-right halves.
    RotationalSymmetry
    Two-fold (180 degree) rotation: the grid looks the same if you turn it completely upside down.
    SudokuGenerator
    Generates 9x9 Sudoku puzzles by producing a full valid grid and then removing cells according to a target ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty and AbstractSymmetry pattern.
    SudokuGrid
    Public-facing representation of a Sudoku grid.
    SudokuSolver
    Solves a Sudoku grid using recursive backtracking.

    Represents a tuple of two elements.
